summary: AI V2 Position Sizing feature fully tested. Backend (13/13 tests passed) and Frontend (100% functional). New position sizing shows '% of available USDT' instead of 'Min-Max Order'. All three profiles display correct ranges: Aggressive (15%-35%), Moderate (8%-18%), Conservative (3%-8%). ATR-based Stop Loss and dynamic Take Profit R:R ratios displayed correctly.

issues: Minor React hydration warning about span inside tbody - does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: server.py:352-445 - GET /api/ai/profiles correctly returns position_pct_range, position_usd_min, position_usd_max based on usdt_free
server.py:447-550 - GET /api/ai/preview/{mode} correctly returns new V2 format with reasoning
ai_engine_v2.py:90-216 - RISK_PROFILES_V2 configuration verified: Aggressive (15-35%), Moderate (8-18%), Conservative (3-8%)
TradingModeSelector.js:187-343 - AIStatusPanelV2 component correctly displays Position Size as % of USDT with calculated order range
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI V2 Position Sizing feature fully implemented and tested. New API response format uses position_pct_range (e.g. '15%-35%') and position_usd_min/position_usd_max instead of old min_order/max_order. Frontend displays 'Position Size: X% vom verfügbaren USDT' with calculated order in USD. Test credentials: test@example.com/testpass123. Note: MEXC API keys are invalid for test account (expected 502 on /api/account/balance).

GET /api/ai/profiles.details: Returns all 4 profiles with position_pct_range, position_usd_min, position_usd_max, usdt_free

GET /api/ai/preview/ai_aggressive.details: Returns position_pct_range: '15%-35%', ATR SL: 2.0x-2.5x, TP R:R 2.5:1-3.5:1

GET /api/ai/preview/ai_moderate.details: Returns position_pct_range: '8%-18%', ATR SL: 1.5x-2.0x, TP R:R 2.0:1-2.5:1

GET /api/ai/preview/ai_conservative.details: Returns position_pct_range: '3%-8%', ATR SL: 1.2x-1.8x, TP R:R 1.5:1-2.0:1

Frontend AI Status Panel V2.details: Shows Position Size as % of USDT, Berechnete Order with range, ATR Stop Loss, Take Profit R:R

Frontend Mode Switching.details: Dropdown shows all modes with % ranges, switching updates all display values correctly

Trading Budget as Cap.details: Trading Budget (Cap): $500 and Verbleibend: $500.00 displayed in UI
